mapper.select:
SELECT id, title, user_id, view_count, reg_date, update_date FROM board WHERE del_yn = 'N'
AND user_id LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
AND title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT #{pageSize} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM board WHERE del_yn = 'N'
AND user_id LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
AND title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
SELECT id, title, content, user_id, view_count, reg_date, update_date FROM board WHERE id = #{id} AND del_yn = 'N'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO board (title, content, user_id) VALUES (#{title}, #{content}, #{userId})
mapper.update: UPDATE board SET title = #{title}, content = #{content}, update_date = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
